response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and systems, including C++ and distributed systems, but lacks direct leadership experience in cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers. His background leans heavily toward frontend/backend development and embedded systems, with limited demonstrated involvement in large-scale cloud infrastructure or technical leadership roles.
strengths: Strong C++ experience (8+ years) meeting minimum qualifications
Proven track record in software architecture and design across diverse projects
Extensive open-source contributions and community engagement (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: No direct experience with cloud compute platforms or DevOps engineering
Lacks documented technical leadership or mentoring roles in cloud/DevOps contexts
Production cloud architecture experience (preferred qualification) not evident in resume
